name: Tamago Danshaku
description:
__Devil fruit:__~!Tama Tama no Mi (Egg-Egg Fruit)!~
__Bounty:__~!429,000,000!~

Baron Tamago is a combatant in Big Mom's crew, who originates from the Longleg Tribe. He and his partner Pekoms are responsible for collecting the monthly payment of sweets from Fishman Island in exchange for Big Mom's protection.
